---
title: "Week 3: R package development"
summary: "Learn the package-development workflow: metadata, documentation, checks, tests, and CI."
prepare: "Watch the package-building video and come ready to work inside an R package project."
resource_label: "R Packages"
resource_url: "https://r-pkgs.org"
focus:
  - "Package metadata and structure"
  - "Documentation and testing"
  - "Package checks and websites"
  - "Continuous integration with GitHub Actions"
---

```{r}
week <- 3
source(here::here("course_info.R"))
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
show_week_overview(week)
```

## Main reference

 * [*R Packages (2e)*](https://r-pkgs.org)

## What you will learn this week

* Package metadata
* Package documentation
* Package checks and tests
* Package website
* Continuous integration via GitHub Actions

## Pre-class activities

* Watch [Building R packages with devtools and usethis](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EpTkT6Rkgbs)

```{r}
#| output: asis
show_slides(week)
show_assignments(week)
```
